title: VanishUltimate
description: ✅ VanishUltimate — Advanced Vanish Plugin VanishUltimate is a powerful invisibility tool for Minecraft servers, offering a modern, GUI-based vanish system with advanced features tailored for staff, moderators, and admins.
body:
**✅ VanishUltimate — Advanced Vanish Plugin**
VanishUltimate is a powerful invisibility tool for Minecraft servers, offering a modern, GUI-based vanish system with advanced features tailored for staff, moderators, and admins.

**🔹 Features**
- Simple, one-click vanish toggle via an in-game GUI
- Night vision, spectator mode, and full interaction bypass (God mode)
- Auto-vanish on join
- Hide from tab list
- Toggle join/leave messages
- Action bar status display
- Staff notifications
- Full configuration support
- No more vanish levels—everything is managed through the GUI

**🔹 Commands**
- /vanish — Open the vanish settings GUI
- /vanish toggle [player] — Toggle vanish for yourself or another player
- /vanish on [player] — Enable vanish for yourself or another player
- /vanish off [player] — Disable vanish for yourself or another player
- /vanish list — List all vanished players
- /vanish reload — Reload the plugin configuration

**🔹 Permissions**
- vanish.use — Use vanish and open the GUI
- vanish.others — Toggle vanish for other players
- vanish.see — See vanished players
- vanish.notify — Receive staff notifications
- vanish.list — Use /vanish list
- vanish.reload — Reload the plugin configuration
- vanish.* — All permissions

**✅ Minecraft 1.18+ | ⚡ Optimized | 📦 PlaceholderAPI support**
